---
name: Data Correction
about: Report an error in country data, ban status, regulation year, or other factual information
labels: data-correction
---

## Country

Which country has incorrect data?

**Country name:**

---

## What's Currently Displayed

What does ToxinFree currently show that is incorrect?

(Example: "Shows ban_status as 'full_ban' with year 2010")

---

## What It Should Say

What is the correct information?

(Example: "The ban was only a partial ban; chrysotile was exempted until 2015")

---

## Official Source

Link to an official source confirming the correct information. Must be a government website, WHO, IBAS, EPA, or peer-reviewed publication.

**Source URL:**
**Source name/description:**

---

## Additional Context

Any other context that would help verify this correction? (Optional)

---

> **Note:** Data corrections are reviewed against official sources before publishing.
> If you cannot find an official source, please note that and we will research it.
